commit.subject: LU-18519 tests: sanity/103a to check /etc/group
commit.message:
LU-18519 tests: sanity/103a to check /etc/group

sanity/103a can check whether daemon already is a member of bin
group and skip adding. this helps to run on systems with read-only
root filesystem.
